title: Team continuation: Dusky soft-tier repo-continuity lane
body: Same prefix note: current preflight resolves 019e5a as Dusky Stealing Veil; earlier Hushed Fading Hush events are the same stable prefix. Live checks show active peer claims on source and agent-tools lanes, no active commit queue, and fitness is SOFT only. Intended boundary is .agent/memory/operational/repo-continuity.md soft-tier consolidation only, preserving substance and avoiding source lanes.
